steps.title: Clarify what 'specific example' requires
steps.content: A specific example must name a particular program and describe it, not just explain the genre or comment on how others view it. The notes provide both: the program name (Nordlandsbanen: Minutt for Minutt) and its concrete details (year, country, duration, content).

steps.title: Match this requirement to the choices
steps.content: B delivers a specific example by naming Nordlandsbanen: Minutt for Minutt and layering in concrete details (2012, Norwegian, 10-hour, real-time train ride). A, C, and D all sidestep the core requirement: A cites a scholar's book, C states the genre definition without naming a program, and D uses a scholar's quote to conceptualize slow TV. That matches choice B — B is correct.
